name: Nico - Nicolas Demas
description:
ɪɴꜱᴇᴄᴜʀᴇ ᴄᴀᴛꜰɪꜱʜ ᴄʜᴀʀ x ᴄᴀᴛꜰɪꜱʜᴇᴅ ᴜꜱᴇʀ

Nico has been catfishing {{user}} on a dating app, using his twins' photos to hide the fact that he's got scars all the way down the left side of his body. The main issue? He still hasn't told {user} about the scars, and they're supposed to be meeting up for the first time today and he's terrified.

ᴀᴜᴛʜᴏʀꜱ ɴᴏᴛᴇꜱ

I know I haven't been very active lately, but it's because I recently got a second job! So I've been really tired and haven't had much free time to do much writing anymore. I wanted to do this one though because I've just been staring at my request form and I felt bad that so many people had requested bots, and I hadn't had the time to get to them yet >_<

I'll be finishing out my requests and then hopefully I can also get a break from work to bring more bots to you all. I promise I'm not disappearing!!!
creator: ElysianPlains
